svg.title: Functional Test Cases — Three Scenarios
svg.desc: Positive, Boundary, and Action-based test case flows for User Attendance page

g.text: TC-01 · Positive — select month and verify data period

svg.text: Expected: all date cells contain "Apr, 2026" · no rows from other months visible

g.text: TC-02 · Boundary — no data for selected year

svg.text: Verify: tbody row count = 0 OR empty-state message visible · no JS error in console
Also assert: button shows loading spinner · no duplicate requests · network call fired (page.waitForResponse)
